title: zixuan417/humanoid-general-motion-tracking
abstract:
The official codebase of paper "GMT: General Motion Tracking for Humanoid Whole-Body Control"

General Motion Tracking for Humanoid Whole-Body Control Zixuan Chen *,1,2 | Mazeyu Ji *,1 | Xuxin Cheng 1 | Xuanbin Peng 1 Xue Bin Peng† 2 | Xiaolong Wang† 1 1 UC San Diego &nbsp 2 Simon Fraser University * Equal Contribution &nbsp † Equal Advising Website | arXiv | Video ## Overview This codebase supports Mujoco simulation of motion tracking on Unitree G1 robot. We provide a pretrained checkpoint and several example motions. This codebase is lightweight and easy to use. We have tested it both on Linux and M1 MacOS. ## Installation && Running First, clone this repo and install all the dependencies: Then you can start to test the pretrained policy's performance on several example motions by running the following command: To change motions, you can replace `walk_stand.pkl` with other motions in the [motions](assets/motions/) folder. You can also view the kinematics motion by running: ## ‼️Alert & Disclaimer Although the pretrained policy has been successfully tested on our machine, the performance of the policy might vary on different robots. We cannot guarantee the success of deployment on every machine. The model we provide is for research use only, and we disclaim all responsibility for any harm, loss, or malfunction arising from its deployment. ## News - [ ] Data processing and retargeter code will be released soon. ## Acknowledgements + The Mujoco simulation script is originally adapted from [LCP](https://github.com/zixuan417/smooth-humanoid-locomotion). + For human motion part, we mainly refer to [ASE](https://github.com/nv-tlabs/ASE) and [PHC](https://github.com/ZhengyiLuo/PHC). ## Citation If you find this codebase useful, please consider citing our work:
abstract_zh: 本文提出了GMT（通用运动跟踪）方法，用于人形机器人的全身控制。该代码库支持在Unitree G1机器人上进行Mujoco仿真运动跟踪，提供了预训练模型和多种示例运动。代码库轻量且易于使用，已在Linux和M1 MacOS上测试通过。用户可通过简单命令测试策略性能，并切换不同运动。注意：策略在不同机器人上性能可能有所差异，仅供研究使用。
tldr_zh: 提出GMT方法，实现人形机器人全身通用运动跟踪。
cover_zh: 人形机器人也能跳科目三？这个通用运动跟踪框架让G1机器人动起来！

judge.reason: 官方人形全身运动跟踪算法，提供预训练模型与仿真，可落地研究。

>[!abstract] 一句话总结：提出通用运动跟踪框架GMT，结合预训练策略和Mujoco仿真，支持多种运动示例的全身控制。


# 一、动机

> 现有运动跟踪方法缺乏通用性和易用性，难以直接迁移到不同人形机器人，该方法旨在提供一个轻量级、易于使用的通用运动跟踪框架。


# 二、方法

> 提出通用运动跟踪框架GMT，结合预训练策略和Mujoco仿真，支持多种运动示例的全身控制。


# 三、核心实验结果

> 在Unitree G1机器人上测试成功，提供多个示例运动（如walk_stand.pkl），支持Linux和M1 MacOS，但未提供具体性能数字。


# 四、对我的启发

> 模型在不同机器人上性能可能不一致，作者声明不保证成功部署；可用于人形机器人全身控制，但需更多鲁棒性测试。
